[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 011000100 3
5 100101110 5
6 100111000 4
7 001010101 4
